title: On Miss Jean Scott.
content:
Oh! had each Scot of ancient times,
            Been Jeany Scott, as thou art,
        The bravest heart on English ground
            Had yielded like a coward!
meaning:
Robert Burns's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "On Miss Jean Scott."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
